contexts.context: The <mark>glaciers</mark> of the Aar, which we visited from the...
...vainly sought to follow the interminable frozen leagues of <mark>glaciers</mark>, propped up in towering pyramids or shapeless heaps...
...there was some contrast, some relief. The <mark>glaciers</mark> of Chamouni are bordered by glowing harvests; the...
...by glowing harvests; the[Page 339]<mark>glaciers</mark> of Grindelwald are bounded by its romantic vale;...
...Grindelwald are bounded by its romantic vale; the <mark>glaciers</mark> of the Schiedeck shine forth amidst its majestic woods...
